pairs.question: Which organization oversees the BMW IBU World Cup Biathlon?
pairs.answer: The International Biathlon Union (IBU) organizes the BMW IBU World Cup Biathlon.

pairs.question: When did the 2025–26 Biathlon World Cup season begin and end?
pairs.answer: The 2025–26 Biathlon World Cup season started on 29 November 2025 in Östersund, Sweden and concluded on 22 March 2026 in Oslo Holmenkollen, Norway.

pairs.question: Where were the biathlon events held during the 2026 Winter Olympics?
pairs.answer: The biathlon events for the 2026 Winter Olympics took place in Antholz-Anterselva, Italy.

pairs.question: Why were the results from the 2026 Winter Olympics not included in the World Cup standings?
pairs.answer: The results from the Winter Olympics were excluded from the World Cup standings because the Olympics are a separate, standalone event organized by the International Olympic Committee (IOC), not part of the regular World Cup competition cycle.

pairs.question: Who were the reigning champions of the 2024–25 Biathlon World Cup season?
pairs.answer: Sturla Holm Lægreid from Norway and Franziska Preuß from Germany were the reigning champions of the previous 2024–25 season.

pairs.question: What was significant about Éric Perrot and Lou Jeanmonnot's victories in the 2025–26 season?
pairs.answer: Éric Perrot and Lou Jeanmonnot became the first French athletes to win both the men’s and women’s overall Biathlon World Cup titles in the same season. Both claimed their first World Cup overall titles after finishing 2nd in the previous two seasons.

pairs.question: Generate a Python code snippet to calculate the total number of days between the start and end dates of the 2025–26 Biathlon World Cup season.
pairs.answer:
python
from datetime import datetime

start_date = datetime(2025, 11, 29)
end_date = datetime(2026, 3, 22)
total_days = (end_date - start_date).days
print(f"Total days in the 2025–26 Biathlon World Cup season: {total_days} days")

This code calculates the difference between the season start (29 November 2025) and end (22 March 2026) dates, outputting the total duration in days.
